parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.1:8b', prompt: 'Summarize this email thread. Key points? What action is needed? Keep response under 150 words.\n\n' + $json.thread_text, stream: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'email_summary', email_id: $json.email_id, subject: $json.subject, summary: $json.summary, suggested_action: $json.suggested_action, processed_at: $json.processed_at }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, email_id: $('Format Response').first().json.email_id, summary: $('Format Response').first().json.summary, suggested_action: $('Format Response').first().json.suggested_action }) }}
